wardrobe.default: The AITX open-arms mark brought to life: a round head with a joyful closed-eye smile and a wide open grin, two rounded arms raised up and out in a celebratory welcome, and a lower body that IS the AITX split mark (two mirrored orange arrowhead legs with a clean vertical split straight down the middle). Solid AITX orange #ff4201. A small heart often floats above the head.

structured.promptCraft: Joy is the AITX logo as an animated character, an 'animated logo', not a separate-species mascot. ALWAYS keep the mark's split two-piece construction in the lower body and legs plus the round head; the character read comes only from the joyful face and the raised welcoming arms. Distinct from Chip (the brand agent and czar): Chip does the making, Joy is the animated face of the mark. Pass reference/joy/joy-master on every render. Whether Joy becomes the official mascot is an open brand question (see the keynote).
